sentence: 医生建议妈妈坚持用母乳喂养宝宝。
pinyin: Yīshēng jiànyì māma jiānchí yòng mǔrǔ wèiyǎng bǎobao.
english: The doctor advises mothers to persist in breastfeeding their babies.

sentence: 新的领导班子已经正式成立。
pinyin: Xīn de lǐngdǎo bānzi yǐjīng zhèngshì chénglì.
english: The new leadership team has been officially established.

sentence: 他从不在意富贵，只想过平静的生活。
pinyin: Tā cóng bù zàiyì fùguì, zhǐ xiǎng guò píngjìng de shēnghuó.
english: He never cares about wealth and status; he just wants a peaceful life.

meaning: 1. to suggest (rather than depict in detail); 2. freehand style of Chi
sentence: 他喜欢画写意山水，风格自由豪放。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān huà xiěyì shānshuǐ, fēnggé zìyóu háofàng.
english: He enjoys painting freehand landscapes in a free and bold style.

sentence: 这个字的本义是指太阳。
pinyin: Zhège zì de běnyì shì zhǐ tàiyáng.
english: The original meaning of this character refers to the sun.
